scripts.postinstall: npm run fix:bin-perms && npm run build -w @akademik/shared
scripts.dev: node ./node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @akademik/server" "npm run dev -w @akademik/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @akademik/shared && npm run build -w @akademik/server && npm run build -w @akademik/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @akademik/shared && npm run typecheck -w @akademik/server && npm run typecheck -w @akademik/client
